overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a leather jacket exploring a futuristic urban waterfront district. The character walks across a metal bridge, traverses a corporate plaza with the 'Tidis' building, and descends to a lower gravel path beside a water feature with lily pads.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront boardwalk approach to pedestrian bridge

events.description: character begins ascending the metal bridge ramp
exits bridge onto paved plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden dock and ascending metal truss bridge over water canal

entered.detail: futuristic curved white building with horizontal louvers and glass facade
metal pedestrian bridge with wooden planks and triangular truss structure crossing water
calm water channel running alongside the walkway with concrete edges
smooth concrete wall with black metal railings above

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock beside a water canal, approaching and ascending a metal truss bridge. The futuristic white office building dominates the right side of the frame while the camera moves steadily forward and upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with landscaped planters and building entrance

events.description: construction worker NPC in orange jacket becomes visible near railing
pedestrian in green puffer jacket enters frame walking same direction

agents.ego_description: walking across paved plaza passing large concrete planters and approaching the Tidis building entrance

notable_agents.action: construction worker in orange safety jacket standing near railing looking at phone
pedestrian in green puffer jacket walking in same direction ahead of camera

entered.detail: large rectangular white planters with spherical green shrubs
dark building facade with illuminated blue Tidis corporate logo
large vertical digital display showing building directory information

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the character walks across a sunlit paved plaza lined with large concrete planters containing spherical shrubs. The Tidis building with its prominent blue signage rises on the right, while a construction worker and other pedestrians appear in the vicinity.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance ramp with corporate branding and waterfall feature

events.description: character turns toward and begins descending concrete ramp to lower level
moving from upper plaza level to lower service area with gravel ground

agents.ego_description: walking along building facade past the waterfall feature and descending concrete ramp to lower level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking up the ramp toward camera

entered.detail: water cascade feature on building facade with metallic horizontal louvers
descending concrete walkway with low walls and scattered leaves
blue crowd control barriers with white Tidis logo text

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the building facade, passing a decorative waterfall feature before turning to descend a concrete ramp. Blue branded barriers line the path as the environment transitions from the upper plaza to a lower service level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level waterfront path with naturalistic water feature

events.description: entering gravel area with water feature and glass railings

agents.ego_description: walking along gravel path beside water feature with lily pads and glass railing

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and walking along the water feature edge

entered.detail: ground covered with small gray gravel stones and scattered leaves
transparent glass barrier with metal posts separating path from garden
shallow water with lily pads and tall aquatic grasses
futuristic white bridge structure spanning the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: Now on the lower level, the character walks along a gravel path beside a naturalistic water feature filled with lily pads and aquatic plants. A glass railing lines the right side while other pedestrians walk along the water's edge, and a futuristic bridge structure is visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a waterfront dock through a corporate plaza and down into a landscaped lower level. It begins with the character walking along a wooden dock beside a canal, steadily ascending a metal truss bridge beneath the shadow of a towering white office building. As the camera crosses the bridge, the scene opens into a sunlit paved plaza where the character passes spherical shrubs in concrete planters and the prominent blue signage of the Tidis building. The movement then follows the building's facade past a decorative waterfall before turning to descend a concrete ramp lined with blue branded barriers. Finally, the environment shifts from the sterile upper plaza to a lower service level, where the character walks along a gravel path beside a naturalistic water feature filled with lily pads and aquatic plants.
